nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails are being groomed and tracked this morning.
nubsNob.comments: Happy Easter! Today is the final day of skiing for the 2025/26 season at Nub's Nob. The snow surface is machine groomed with a firm crust. The softest snow will be back on Pintail Peak as the Pintail area was groomed this morning. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. today. No NASTAR today. There is an Easter Egg Scavenger Hunt for kids 12 and under to do on skis today. Please go to the front desk for the rules to the game. Thank you for choosing to ski with us and make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
